name: yar
description: Yar — a reusable toolkit of Claude Code skills and agents.

plugins.name: yar
plugins.description: A toolkit of reusable Claude Code skills and agents: an invoke-only git workflow with guard hooks, deep web research via the Gemini CLI, an Agent Skills authoring/validation kit, a project-agnostic file organizer, a macOS meeting recorder plus a transcribe/summarize/route processor (ElevenLabs Scribe v2, Gemini fallback), a Markdown→RTL/Persian PDF renderer (Vazirmatn), a claim-sourcing helper that links every factual claim to its original independent source, and an always-on guard that blocks destructive commands. Skills act only when invoked.
